text.message: that was a nice second spot to get, almost went there :D
Also, there is not a lot of brick and wood on this board
But you know what it's like when you place first and you're split between two places!
Some boards one spot is obviously far superior.... mind you I've seen ones where there are 3/4 good first spots
The 5-6-9 is about as good as a starting spot gets
Sheep port you will be solid
but i need to poitn left for the ore
dont give him the settle like this
